race.comment: Tough race. THUNDERBOLT WAY (7) was well below his best when last seen at Kilmore on heavy ground but had been going well prior and can bounce back. ITSAGIVEN (10) made nice improvement second up at Mornington when grabbing second at huge odds and have to respect off that. Expected to go close. CREUSA (9) fitter for two runs back and should improve up to 2000m third up. LINKENHOLT (1) finished sixth on debut last start at Werribee and with the race experience onboard is likely to improve on that here. NOBLE FALCON (5) changes rider since being well held last time in 15th over 2800m in the LR VRC St Leger at Flemington. Suited here and look for an improved run.
